keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Delay in match because of an injury Mahmoud Abunada (Qatar).
Delay in match because of an injury Remo Freuler (Switzerland).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Mahmoud Abunada (Qatar) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Qatar 0, Switzerland 1. Breel Embolo (Switzerland) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Jassem Gaber (Qatar) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Pedro Miguel (Qatar).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Denis Zakaria (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half begins Qatar 0, Switzerland 1.
Delay in match because of an injury Boualem Khoukhi (Qatar).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Qatar. Ahmed Fathy replaces Ayoub Al Oui.
Substitution, Qatar. Karim Boudiaf replaces Jassem Gaber.
Substitution, Qatar. Ahmed Alaa replaces Yusuf Abdurisag.
Substitution, Switzerland. Fabian Rieder replaces Michel Aebischer.
Substitution, Switzerland. Johan Manzambi replaces Dan Ndoye.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Qatar. Mohammad Al Mannai replaces Assim Madibo.
Substitution, Switzerland. Zeki Amdouni replaces Rubén Vargas.
Substitution, Qatar. Hassan Al Haydos replaces Edmílson Junior.
Substitution, Switzerland. Ardon Jashari replaces Remo Freuler.
Substitution, Switzerland. Miro Muheim replaces Ricardo Rodríguez.
Own Goal by Miro Muheim, Switzerland. Qatar 1, Switzerland 1.
